description_long: This object consists of two mushrooms, one mature and one immature, both with distinct features. The larger mushroom has a broad, flat cap that is orange with scattered white patches, and a tall, slender stem that transitions from pale yellow at the top to a darker brown at the base. The cap's surface appears smooth with a slightly matte finish, and the margin is gently curved. The smaller mushroom is more bulbous, with a whitish, textured surface and no visible cap separation. Both mushrooms have a natural, organic appearance, with subtle color gradients and realistic surface details. The stems show some fibrous texture and a faint ring near the top of the larger mushroom.
description: A pair of mushrooms, one with an orange, white-spotted cap and tall stem, the other smaller and round with a pale, textured surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing both mushrooms clearly, with the large cap's orange color and white spots most visible.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the thickness of the cap and the slenderness of the stem, with the smaller mushroom partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the underside of the cap and the full height of the stem, with the smaller mushroom in front.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the cap's curvature and the relationship between the two mushrooms, with the stem's color gradient visible.
